#+TITLE: Link Edge Cases

* Valid links

[[https://example.com]]

[[https://example.com][Example Website]]

[[file:other.org]]

[[file:other.org][Other Document]]

[[file:image.png]]

[[/absolute/path/to/file]]

[[./relative/path]]

[[#custom-id]]

[[#custom-id][Link to section]]

[[*Heading][Link to heading]]

* Angle bracket links

<https://example.com>

<mailto:user@example.com>

* Malformed links (should be caught by lint)

[[unclosed link

[[target][description with missing close

[[]]

[[][empty target with description]]

* Links in various contexts

Links in a table:
| Link | Description |
|------+-------------|
| [[https://example.com][link]] | A link in a table |

Links in a list:
- [[https://a.com][First]]
- [[https://b.com][Second]]
  - [[https://c.com][Nested]]

* Links with special characters

[[https://example.com/path?q=hello&lang=en]]

[[https://example.com/path%20with%20spaces]]

[[file:name with spaces.org][Spaced filename]]

* Internal links

<<target>>

Link to [[target]].

* Multiple links on one line

See [[https://a.com][A]] and [[https://b.com][B]] and [[https://c.com][C]].

* Link-like text in code

#+BEGIN_SRC python
url = "[[not-a-link]]"
#+END_SRC

=[[also not a link in verbatim]]=

~[[not a link in code]]~

* Plain URLs (not org links)

Visit https://example.com for more info.
Or http://old-style.com if you prefer.
